briefdescription.para: FRL Overhead and Timing Constants from HDMI 2.1 Spec Table 6-41.
Overhead percentages scaled by 100000 for fixed-point calculation.
Precomputed common overhead: RS + MAP + Margin (lane-independent portion)
This function is called during FRL link training when it is decided to fallback to the legacy HDMI TMDS mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback reference.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_HdmiTxSs1 *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VmId, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiTxSs1_FrlCalcBandwidth

briefdescription.para: This function performs FRL bandwidth calculations and determines if the requested video and audio streams can be supported by the trained FRL link.

detaileddescription.para: Audio parameters are automatically fetched from the instance.

parameterdescription.para:
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs1 instance. The trained FRL LineRate and Lanes are fetched from InstancePtr->HdmiTx1Ptr->Stream.Frl after FRL training. Audio parameters are fetched from:
InstancePtr->AudioEnabled
InstancePtr->HdmiTx1Ptr->Stream.Audio.SampleFrequency
InstancePtr->AudioChannels
is the video mode ID used to lookup timing information via XVidC_GetVideoModeData().
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr444, YCbCr422, YCbCr420).
is the bits per color component (8, 10, 12, 16).

listitem.para: TRUE if video+audio bandwidth fits within the trained FRL rate.
FALSE if bandwidth exceeds capacity or resolution is not divisible by 4.

simplesect.para: This function prints bandwidth calculation results and diagnostic information to the console via xil_printf. For TMDS mode (LineRate=0), returns TRUE if bandwidth is within 18 Gbps limit, FALSE otherwise. For FRL mode, FRL training must be completed before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: This is main code of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter Subsystem device driver.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmitxss1.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 EB 22/05/18 Initial release.
